StatusUnit.Name: IDLE
CHECKEND
CHECKFAIL
扫码结束
等待开始检测信号
RBIN
LB
HB
PES光型检测
扫码
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Method.ReadBarcode(P26480135:7:57);

StatusUnit.Name: 测试结束
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Field.PcWriteCheckEnd=1; PowerNgi3412E.Method.PowerOff();

StatusUnit.Name: 示教模组
开始检测
Start
到LB的HV处测试色温
到HB的HV处测试色温
PreStart
LB
HB
开始运动模组
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Field.PcWriteServoRun=1; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(1000);

StatusUnit.Name: 模组运动到位
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Field.PcWriteServoRun=0;

StatusUnit.Name: 扫码
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Method.ReadBarcode(P26480135:7:57);

StatusUnit.Name: 扫码结束
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: PLC.Field.PcWriteBarcodeScanEnd=1; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(500);

Condition.Name: IDLE_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: PES光型检测.Method.OpenCamera(); 检测程序.Field.IsRun=1;
Condition.ExitNote: PES光型检测.Method.OpenCamera(); 检测程序.Field.IsRun=1;

Condition.Name: 扫码结束_等待开始检测信号
PRESTART_扫码
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsInCali==0&& PLC.Field.PcReadCheckStart==0&& PLC.Field.PcReadBarcodeScanStart==1&& 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsInCali==0&& PLC.Field.PcReadCheckStart==0&& PLC.Field.PcReadBarcodeScanStart==1&& 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==0&&

Condition.Name: CHECKEND_测试结束
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.模组运动启动==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.模组运动启动==0&&

Condition.Name: CHECKFAIL_测试结束
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.模组运动启动==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.模组运动启动==0&&

Condition.Name: 测试结束_PRESTART
PES光型检测_是否示教模组
是否示教模组_示教模组
是否示教模组_不示教模组
不示教模组_近光模组位置计算OK
Condition.ConditionFunction: NDLBPES001.Para.LB图像分析结果==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB图像分析结果==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HV==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.EMax_At_H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.EMax_At_V==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.EMax==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.Grad_2.5L==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.B50L==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.BR==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段BLL==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.P==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.Ⅲ区==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.S50+S50LL+S50RR==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.S100+S100LL+S100RR==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.75R==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.50R==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.50V==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.50L==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段50==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.40R==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.40L==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段40RR==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段40LL==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段25R==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段25==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.25V==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段25L==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段15==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段10==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段10及以下==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_EMax==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_12L-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_9L-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_6L-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_3L-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_3R-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_6R-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_9R-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_12R-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_V-2U==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: NDLBPES001.Para.LB图像分析结果==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB图像分析结果==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HV==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.EMax_At_H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.EMax_At_V==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.EMax==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.Grad_2.5L==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.B50L==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.BR==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段BLL==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.P==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.Ⅲ区==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.S50+S50LL+S50RR==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.S100+S100LL+S100RR==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.75R==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.50R==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.50V==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.50L==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段50==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.40R==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.40L==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段40RR==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段40LL==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段25R==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段25==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.25V==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段25L==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段15==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段10==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.线段10及以下==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_EMax==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_12L-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_9L-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_6L-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_3L-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_3R-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_6R-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_9R-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_12R-H==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.HB_V-2U==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: PRESTART_开始检测
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsInCali==0&& PLC.Field.PcReadCheckStart==1&& 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsInCali==0&& PLC.Field.PcReadCheckStart==1&& 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==0&&

Condition.Name: 开始检测_Start
Condition.ConditionFunction: SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.模组运动启动==0&& PLC.Field.PcWriteServoXPos==0&& PLC.Field.PcWriteServoZPos==70&&
Condition.ConditionNote: SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.模组运动启动==0&& PLC.Field.PcWriteServoXPos==0&& PLC.Field.PcWriteServoZPos==70&&

Condition.Name: 等待开始检测信号_开始检测
到LB的HV处测试色温_到HB的HV处测试色温
近光模组位置计算OK_到LB的HV处测试色温
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsTransferHbOk==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsTransferLbOk==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsTransferHbOk==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsTransferLbOk==1&&

Condition.Name: 判断色温_CHECKEND
Condition.ConditionFunction: NDLBPES001.Para.近光25V色度==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.远光HV色度==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: NDLBPES001.Para.近光25V色度==TRUE&& NDLBPES001.Para.远光HV色度==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 到HB的HV处测试色温_判断色温
Condition.ConditionFunction: SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.模组运动启动==0&& SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.调试变量1==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.模组运动启动==0&& SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.调试变量1==0&&

Condition.Name: 近光模组位置计算OK_判断色温
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsTransferLbOk==0|| PES光型检测.Field.IsTransferHbOk==0||
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsTransferLbOk==0|| PES光型检测.Field.IsTransferHbOk==0||
Condition.ExitFunction: PES光型检测.Field.OutputLb25VColor=-9999; PES光型检测.Field.OutputHbHVColor=-9999;
Condition.ExitNote: PES光型检测.Field.OutputLb25VColor=-9999; PES光型检测.Field.OutputHbHVColor=-9999;

Condition.Name: IDLE_PreStart
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& 检测程序.Field.IsRun==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& 检测程序.Field.IsRun==1&&

Condition.Name: PreStart_LB
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&

Condition.Name: LB_HB
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==1&&

Condition.Name: LB_PreStart
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==0&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==0&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&

Condition.Name: HB_LB
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&

Condition.Name: HB_PreStart
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==0&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==0&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==0&&

Condition.Name: PreStart_HB
Condition.ConditionFunction: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PES光型检测.Field.IsLbOn==1&& PES光型检测.Field.IsHbOn==1&&

Condition.Name: 开始运动模组_模组运动到位
模组运动到位_PreStart
Condition.ExitFunction: SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.模组运动启动=0; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(1000);
Condition.ExitNote: SY-G-NDLB-PES.Part.模组运动启动=0; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(1000);
